summary.zh: 这里是属于斗气的世界，没有花俏艳丽的魔法，有的，仅仅是繁衍到巅峰的斗气！
summary.en: In a land where no magic exists, a land where the strong make the rules and the weak are enslaved, a young man named Xiao Yan works to restore his family's honor.

title.en: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality

summary.zh: 一个普通的山村少年，偶然踏入修仙之门，从此走上了一条坎坷漫长的修仙之路。
summary.en: An ordinary village youth accidentally stumbles onto the path of immortality, beginning a long and arduous journey of cultivation.

summary.zh: 网游荣耀中被誉为斗神的叶修，因为种种原因遭到俱乐部的驱逐，离开职业圈的他转身成为网吧网管。
summary.en: Ye Xiu, hailed as the Battle God in the online game Glory, is expelled from his club for various reasons and becomes an internet café manager.

summary.zh: 文化大革命末期，军方探寻外星文明的绝秘计划「红岸工程」取得了突破性进展。
summary.en: During the Cultural Revolution, a secret military project called Red Coast makes a breakthrough in contacting extraterrestrial civilization.

summary.zh: 前世的魏无羡万人唾骂，声名狼藉。重生后他遇到了旧识蓝忘机，两人携手探寻谜团背后的真相。
summary.en: Wei Wuxian was once reviled by the world. After being reborn, he reunites with an old acquaintance, Lan Wangji, to uncover the truth behind a series of mysteries.

summary.zh: 一个身世神秘的年轻人范闲，在家族、江湖、庙堂的纷争中逐渐成长，书写了一段传奇人生。
summary.en: A young man with a mysterious background, Fan Xian, grows up amidst the conflicts of family, martial arts world, and imperial court, writing a legendary life.

summary.zh: 系花贝微微在游戏中意外嫁给了全服第一高手，一段从线上到线下的甜蜜爱情就此展开。
summary.en: University beauty Bei Weiwei unexpectedly marries the top player in an online game, beginning a sweet romance that bridges the virtual and real worlds.

summary.zh: 穿越到异世界的克莱恩凭借一本神秘笔记本，在诡秘与危险并存的维多利亚风世界中探索超凡之路。
summary.en: Transported to a different world, Klein relies on a mysterious notebook to explore the path of the extraordinary in a Victorian-style world full of secrets and danger.

summary.zh: 继承了一家濒临倒闭的恐怖屋后，陈歌发现这座鬼屋似乎真的有鬼，而且不止一个。
summary.en: After inheriting a failing haunted house, Chen Ge discovers that this haunted house actually has real ghosts — and more than one.

summary.zh: 星际时代，人类走出地球进入宇宙大时代，少年楚风在星空中崛起，探寻宇宙最深处的秘密。
summary.en: In the interstellar era, humanity steps into the cosmos. Young Chu Feng rises among the stars, seeking the deepest secrets of the universe.

summary.zh: 一段年少时的爱恋，牵出一生的纠缠。七年分离后，何以琛与赵默笙再度重逢，爱恨交织。
summary.en: A youthful romance leads to a lifetime of entanglements. After seven years apart, He Yichen and Zhao Mosheng reunite in a mix of love and resentment.

title.en: The Daily Life of the Immortal King

summary.zh: 一个拥有仙王实力却只想平凡度过学生时代的少年，他的日常生活注定不平凡。
summary.en: A teenager with the power of an immortal king who just wants to live a normal student life — but his daily life is destined to be anything but ordinary.

summary.zh: 修罗武神，主宰苍穹！一个被家族遗弃的少年，凭借体内的九色神雷，逆天改命，成就武神之路。
summary.en: Abandoned by his clan, a young boy relies on the nine-colored divine thunder within him to defy fate and walk the path of a martial god.

summary.zh: 末日降临，世界陷入混乱。一个神秘的轮盘系统出现，只有通过轮盘赌命的人才能获得生存的资格。
summary.en: The apocalypse descends, plunging the world into chaos. A mysterious roulette system appears — only those who gamble with their lives can survive.
